steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, VERSION, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '04.423.567/0001-21' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 1"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) as ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '04.423.567/0001-21' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE = '2024-12-31' GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.output:

shares_outstanding = 1936973658 - 21193194
market_price = 12.47
market_cap = shares_outstanding * market_price
div_bruta = 69545756000.0
disponibilidades = 12777020000.0
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
patrim_liquido = 80859068000.0
receita_12m = 143383? 
print(shares_outstanding, market_cap, div_bruta, div_liquida, patrimonio_liquido)
"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"shares_outstanding = 1936973658 - 21193194
market_price = 12.47
market_cap = shares_outstanding * market_price
div_bruta = 69545756000
disponibilidades = 12777020000
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
patrim_liq = 80859068000
ebit = 2211909000
dep = 1689626000
ebitda = ebit + dep
net_income = 549472000
lpa = net_income / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrim_liq / shares_outstanding
from math import isnan
print('shares_outstanding=', shares_outstanding)
print('market_cap=', market_cap)
print('EV=', market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades)
print('EBITDA=', ebitda)
print('LPA=', lpa)
print('VPA=', vpa)
print('P/L (approx) = price / LPA =', market_price / lpa if lpa>0 else None)
print('P/VP = price / VPA =', market_price / vpa if vpa>0 else None)
print('Giro Ativos (approx) = receita_12m / Ativo Total')
print('Ativo Total=', 207658926000)
print('Receita 12m (assumed 14.338623e9)??')
"} }
